name: Toll House Choco-Oat Rage
recipeIngredient: 1 1/3 cups Oats; quick or old fashioned
recipeInstructions:
DIRECTIONS ~------------------------------------------------------
~--- IN A LARGE MIXER BOWL, COMBINE MARGARINE, OATS, FLOUR, BROWN
SUGAR, WALNUTS, EGGS, AND VANILLA. BEAT 3 MINUTES AT MEDIUM SPEED OR
UNTIL THE MIXTURE IS LIGHT AND CREAMY. STIR IN 1 CUP CHIPS. SPREAD
BATTER INTO AN 8 IN SQUARE MICROWAVE SAFE BAKING DISH; COVER DISH WITH
WAXED PAPER. COOK ON HIGH FOR 4 MINUTES; ROTATE DISH 1/4 TURN. CONTINUE
COOKING ON HIGH POWER FOR 4-5 MINUTES OR UNTIL THE TOP OF THE CAKE
APPEARS DRY AND THE BOTTOM OF THE CAKE IS AN EVEN COLOR. SPRINKLE THE
REMAINING 1 CUP CHIPS OVER THE TOP OF THE WARM CAKE. LET SET FOR 10
MINUTES, THEN SPREAD CHOCOLATE EVENLY OVER THE CAKE. COOL DIRECTLY ON
THE COUNTER TOP. CUT AND SERVE PIECES. MAKES 8-10
